nodes.context: Japan's largest yakuza gang, led by Masahisa Takenaka as fourth-generation boss.
A rival yakuza group that seceded from Yamaguchi-gumi and assassinated Takenaka.

edges.evidence_quote: However, Takenaka was assassinated at a girlfriend's home in Osaka early the following year by a rival group, the Ichiwa-kai , led by Hiroshi Yamamoto, who had seceded from the clan.
edges.context: Ichiwa-kai seceded from Yamaguchi-gumi and assassinated its boss, sparking the Yama–Ichi War.
